release_notes: Add an admin approval-flow configuration page with contract template editing and live graph preview.
Change the project page to a left project directory and fixed right-side project configuration panel.
Add CC civil and MEP project owner configuration while preserving cc_project_owner compatibility for existing route resolution.
Align the PMCC contract route with the PM/CC/PMCC approval diagram by inserting CC department owner before PM project owner.
Merge Approval Graph views and legacy workflow_tasks in the approval center so restored cloud backups show pending and reviewed records.
